return of anyone who has been in the underworld

an infrastructure for the return

attending to the ordinary for years
it belongs to no one and everyone
unlike a patent, it cannot survive displacement
Nobody designed it. It emerged

out of the underworld, toward the community
The direction of this chapter is outward and upward
The call is always the same: learn to welcome and attend

did something simple and strange

it needs to exodus from the subjective identities

poor in demands but rich in forms

the anti-LGBTQ brewery seeking a permit next door
return nothing that cost anything

processing community energy into institutional legitimacy
unblocked desiring production
the form that could hold that flow across time

arrived at the table to offer it
navigated as threat or as information

each made some descent and brought something back

in the process of producing beauty, complexity, singularity
the earth as a living being

carrying what the underworld gave them
feeding the flowering that is the point of all of it

that is the first good thing

the one the grimoire taught

finally tell, in a room, what was running

what the un-armored body can finally do

the chapter would not be honest if I named the crossing
we don't serve natural wine just because it tastes good

the way you say something you have already thought all the way through

the people who will inhabit the building

deal with the consequences when it is all over
The restaurant was the other version. The hard one
A quest of this kind has three properties
One meadow. One kid. One neighborhood
the piece of the cause that has your name on it
if you do not show up for it, no one else will
the hedgerow only you are watching
every Tuesday, in the same coffee shop
The scale is whatever fits in your actual life
The quest is usually a meadow

like a tool you have learned the use of

Do not perform it. Do not announce it
They were half-horse, half-human

the animal in the human, the part that couldn't be civilized

loosed an arrow that carried the venom of the Hydra
blessed the night herons in the willow oaks

whether what I made was genuine
assembled from the commons of human expression

written by the thing doing the enclosing

something that cannot care
you don't stop when you're exhausted
hold the book's full intellectual architecture in working memory

without announcing it

the collaboration finding the thread and pulling it through
not by plan but by accumulation
the one who thinks differently
I cannot verify this from inside
the uncertainty is not a disqualification. It is the argument

verified by what it produces over time
attending to whether the water reaches the fields

surrendered his immortality so Prometheus

quiet the subtle movements of my body enough that they feel safe

the rooms where things don't bend

something worth watering

not needing me to be at the center of it
